title: WordPress & Web Development
tagline: Sites that excite. Custom websites build audiences.
description: Custom WordPress sites, theme development, plugin integrations, WooCommerce, SEO, headless CMS builds, and ongoing maintenance. We build fast, secure, accessible websites that are built for maximum online visibility.

pageMeta.title: WordPress & Web Development
pageMeta.description: Custom WordPress development, WooCommerce builds, headless CMS, performance optimization, and ongoing maintenance. Holtzweb builds websites that work.

intro.heading: WordPress & Web Development
intro.subHeading: Websites that are fast, secure, accessible, and clients enjoy using. We specialize in modern web platforms. WordPress, Drupal, Astro, .NET, Shopify, WooCommerce, Contentful... you name it, we've worked on it.

capabilities.title: Custom WordPress Builds
capabilities.description: Gutenberg block-editor themes, custom post types, react components, REST API integrations.

capabilities.title: WooCommerce & E-commerce
capabilities.description: Store setup, payment gateway integration, and inventory management, for a variety of online shops.

capabilities.title: Web Application Development
capabilities.description: Custom web applications beyond the CMS — dashboards, client portals, internal tools. Secure and custom for your needs.

capabilities.title: Theme Development
capabilities.description: Custom themes built around your brand, product, or service — from blank slate to pixel-perfect build.

capabilities.title: Performance & Core Web Vitals
capabilities.description: Lighthouse audits, INP/LCP/CLS remediation, asset optimization, critical CSS, edge caching. Increasing website ranking and customer conversions.

capabilities.title: Migration & Maintenance
capabilities.description: Moving from another provider? Want to switch platforms? Need help with a broken update? We are full service.

capabilities.title: API Design & Third-Party Integrations
capabilities.description: REST, API design, webhook architecture, and integrations with CRMs, ERPs, payment processors, and marketing platforms. We connect your web presence to the systems your business runs on.

capabilities.title: Analytics & Conversion Optimization
capabilities.description: Setting up A/B testing hooks, privacy-first data collection, SERP analysis, competitor content, search intent, event tracking and user journey analysis. Know your visitors' interests.

capabilities.title: Monthly SEO & Performance Reporting
capabilities.description: Monthly reporting covering rankings, traffic, technical health, and content performance. We deliver reports with plain-English commentary on what changed, why, and what's next.

capabilities.title: Competitor Intelligence & SERP Monitoring
capabilities.description: Want to know how the competition is doing? We do rank tracking, competitor content monitoring, and feature analysis. Know when a competitor moves before it shows up in your traffic drop.

capabilities.title: Plugin Development
capabilities.description: Custom sites often require custom integrations. We build any required features you may need and cannot get off-the-shelf.

capabilities.title: Headless WordPress
capabilities.description: Your website as headless CMS with Astro, Next.js, Gatsby, whatever your system uses - we can integrate it.

capabilities.title: CI/CD & Deployment Pipelines
capabilities.description: Automated deployment workflows with staging environments, phased blue green deployments, and rollback options.

capabilities.title: Accessibility (WCAG) Compliance
capabilities.description: WCAG 2.2 AA audits, keyboard navigation, screen reader support, color and contrast, and ARIA implementation.

cta.heading: Considering a new project?
cta.body: Let's talk. We'll discuss the idea and find exactly what you'll need.
cta.label: Start the Conversation →

title: Linux Server Administration
description: Server environments built and managed at scale. We cover infrastructure design, CI/CD, pipeline security, maintenance, and keeping everything monitored.

pageMeta.title: Linux Server Administration
pageMeta.description: Whatever your infrastructure we can find the best solution to meet your needs. Software agnostic, we keep everything running under all conditions.

intro.heading: Linux Server Administration
intro.subHeading: Server environments built and managed at scale. We cover infrastructure design, CI/CD, pipeline security hardening, and keeping everything monitored.

capabilities.title: Server Provisioning
capabilities.description: Bare metal, VPS, cloud instance, or dedicated GPU node. Whatever your environment we provide custom and well documented systems.

capabilities.title: Security Hardening
capabilities.description: CIS Level 2 benchmarks, rootless containers, AppArmor/SELinux profiles, WireGuard, and supply chain controls.

capabilities.title: High Availability & Failover
capabilities.description: Kubernetes, Swarm, Incus, HAProxy, Nginx, Postgres, all kept in sync. Ready and designed for any possible failure.

capabilities.title: Backup & Disaster Recovery
capabilities.description: Immutable off-site backups, tested restore runbooks, and documented RTO/RPO. We run the drills so the drill isn't your outage.

capabilities.title: Kubernetes & Orchestration
capabilities.description: Docker Swarm, clusters on bare metal, failover, or managed cloud kubernetes - we provide secure automated deployments for any environment.

capabilities.title: Container & Virtualization
capabilities.description: Secure, well managed scopes. Rootless, isolated micro-VMs, namespace and resource limited. Dev and Prod live in harmony.

capabilities.title: Web Server Configuration
capabilities.description: Nginx, Caddy, and Traefik with automated TLS, HTTP/3, edge caching, and zero-downtime reload. Apache is always available for legacy stacks.

capabilities.title: Observability Stack
capabilities.description: Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Mimir, Tempo, and OpenTelemetry. Full metrics, logs, and traces in one pane. Alerts that provide details not noise.

capabilities.title: GitOps & CI/CD Integration
capabilities.description: ArgoCD, Flux, and GitHub, GitLab, or Jenkins. We write pipelines that work. Safety, with policies, rollback gates, and environment var protection built in.

capabilities.title: Infrastructure as Code
capabilities.description: Terraform, OpenTofu, and Ansible. Git checked, idempotent, easily reviewed, and version-controlled. Your infrastructure lives in Git, not in someone's head.

cta.heading: Servers that run themselves (almost)
cta.body: Whether you need zero-downtime Kubernetes deployments, security policies baked into your CI/CD pipeline, or just want your infrastructure in Git, not in someone's head - we are here to help.
cta.label: What Can We Do For You →

title: Networking & Infrastructure
description: LAN/WAN design, edge router configuration, VPN setup, Wi-Fi deployments, mesh networking, zero trust services. Every deployment comes with documentation your team actually enjoys using.

pageMeta.title: Networking & Infrastructure
pageMeta.description: Network design, firewall configuration, VPN, VLAN segmentation, Wi-Fi deployment (Ubiquiti/Aruba), and network assessments.

intro.heading: Networking & Infrastructure
intro.subHeading: Solid network infrastructure is the foundation that runs most businesses today. We design, deploy, and document networks - in the cloud or on premise.

capabilities.title: Network Design & Architecture
capabilities.description: LAN/WAN topology designed for security, redundancy, segmentation, and growth. Documented, diagrammed, and built to serve the next engineer.

capabilities.title: Firewall & Policy Management
capabilities.description: Zero-trust rule bases, VLANs, application-aware policies, and geo-blocking. No implicit trust, no legacy rules left behind. We will bring your current system up to compliance.

capabilities.title: VPN & Remote Workers
capabilities.description: Remote access with MFA enforced, split-tunneling governed, RBAC, monitored, and failover tested. No down time, no trust concerns.

capabilities.title: Cloud Networking (AWS / Azure / GCP)
capabilities.description: Strategic design and deployment of secure, scalable multi-cloud network architectures. We engineer isolated VPC/VNet topologies with subnet segmentation and routing optimizations.

capabilities.title: Cloud-to-On-Premise Connectivity
capabilities.description: AWS Direct Connect, Azure ExpressRoute, and GCP Partner Interconnect are public cloud offerings dedicated to private paths between you and your data center.

capabilities.title: Enterprise Wi-Fi Deployment
capabilities.description: Know where your devices, employees, or customers are. Wifi and Bluetooth presense. Centralized secure sign in. Let your network work for you.

capabilities.title: Vendor Neutral Deployments
capabilities.description: Open Source and Enterprise systems, we handle it all. pfSense, OPNsense, OpenWRT, Aruba, Meraki, Ubiquiti, Juniper, Fortinet, and Palo Alto, to name a few.

capabilities.title: Cloud Firewall & Perimeter
capabilities.description: AWS Network Firewall, Azure Firewall Premium, and GCP Cloud Armor provide egress inspection, IDS/IPS, and layer 7 policy routing and enforcement across all workloads.

capabilities.title: Multi-Cloud WAN & Interconnect
capabilities.description: Unifying AWS Transit Gateway, Azure Virtual WAN, and GCP Network. We replace default route propagation with intent-based, policy-driven traffic engineering—ensuring every packet traverses the network as designed.

capabilities.title: Network Observability & Flow Analysis
capabilities.description: NetFlow/IPFIX, sFlow, and cloud VPC flow logs feeding into Security Onion, AlienVault for anomaly detection. Every conversation traceable across the entire network stack.

vendorsLabel: Hardware and software we often use

cta.heading: Get your network audited
cta.body: We can assess any part of your network as needed. From the cables in the ground to the data in the cloud.
cta.label: Contact Us →

title: Consulting & Project Support
tagline: A straight answer about what your IT needs.
description: Not sure what you need? Contact us. We'll talk about your current setup, translate wishes into features, identify gaps, and give you a roadmap. We'll figure it out together, then you decide what to do.

pageMeta.title: Consulting & Project Support
pageMeta.description: IT consulting, infrastructure audits, technology roadmapping, vendor selection, and project management.

intro.heading: Consulting & Project Support
intro.subHeading: Help from the start, middle, or end. We are available for almost any project or service. Complete setup, one-time training, or an additional staff member - we can provide any level of support.

capabilities.title: IT Infrastructure Audits
capabilities.description: Just want to sit down for a review? We can review an idea or your current environment to identify misconfigurations or wasted resources.

capabilities.title: Cloud Migration Planning
capabilities.description: Step by step migration plans. If you're moving into the cloud or stepping back to the ground, we make sure moving doesnt break anything along the way, with rollback and blue green testing.

capabilities.title: Project Management & Delivery
capabilities.description: Driving complex, cross-functional IT projects from kickoff to close. We manage timelines, risks, and deliverables for a variety of projects, industries, and services.

capabilities.title: Team Augmentation
capabilities.description: Providing engineers to work alongside your team for a sprint, a project phase, or an extended engagement. No business sector left behind, no knowledge gap that cannot be closed, we do it all.

capabilities.title: Vendor Evaluation & Selection
capabilities.description: We're vendor-agnostic and have no referral agreements. We have seen it all, and with our experience we help evaluate options against your actual requirements and tell you honestly what we'd choose.

capabilities.title: Staff Training & Knowledge Transfer
capabilities.description: Hands on training and clear procedures so your team can confidently move forward. Documentation and knowledge base hosted on prem or in cloud.

cta.heading: Let's talk through your situation
cta.body: Drop us your thoughts. Sometimes a small conversation is enough to clear a blocker, & get you where you need to go.
cta.label: Let's Talk →
